description_long: This is a pair of long-handled hedge shears, featuring two elongated, straight handles with blue and gray rubberized grips for comfort and control. The handles are connected by a central pivot joint, allowing the two sharp, straight steel blades to open and close in a scissor-like motion. The blades are long and narrow, designed for trimming hedges and shrubs with precision, and appear to be made of hardened steel with a slightly matte finish. The handles are ergonomically shaped and capped with blue ends, providing a secure, non-slip grip. The overall construction is robust, with visible bolts and a reinforced pivot for durability during heavy use. No visible branding or logos are present on the tool.
description: A pair of long-handled hedge shears with blue and gray rubberized grips and straight steel blades, designed for precise trimming of hedges and shrubs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handles and the straight alignment of the blades.
description_view_1: Angled view from the handle end, highlighting the blue rubberized grips and the open position of the shears.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handles and the full length of the blades, with the pivot mechanism visible.
description_view_3: Angled view from the blade end, emphasizing the sharpness and length of the blades and the open handles.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, elongated, rubberized handles with blue ergonomic end caps.
attribute_jaw_design: Long, straight, sharp-edged blades designed for hedge trimming; no serrations or wire cutter features.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed central pivot joint with visible bolt, allowing scissor-like motion but no adjustable jaw width.
attribute_grip_pattern: Rubberized, smooth with slight texturing for grip, blue end caps provide additional tactile security.
